seoTitle: How to Track Inventory in QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Set up inventory tracking in QuickBooks Online to manage stock levels, reorder points, and purchase orders for retail and e-commerce.
intro: Tracking inventory accurately is essential for retailers, wholesalers, and e-commerce businesses that need to maintain the right stock levels and fulfill orders on time. This guide covers setting up inventory tracking in QuickBooks Online and using it for day-to-day stock management.

steps.heading: Enable inventory tracking
steps.body: Turn on inventory features within QuickBooks Online if they aren't already active for your account.

steps.heading: Set up your inventory items
steps.body: Add the products you sell as inventory items, including starting stock quantities and reorder points.

steps.heading: Manage purchase and sales orders
steps.body: Use QuickBooks Online to track incoming purchase orders and outgoing sales, which automatically adjusts inventory counts.

steps.heading: Monitor stock levels regularly
steps.body: Check inventory reports periodically to see which items are running low and need reordering.

steps.heading: Adjust for discrepancies
steps.body: If physical counts differ from what's recorded, make manual adjustments to keep your inventory data accurate.

faq.question: Can QuickBooks Online set automatic reorder points?
faq.answer: Yes, you can configure reorder points for inventory items so you're alerted when stock runs low.

faq.question: Is inventory tracking available on all QuickBooks Online plans?
faq.answer: Inventory tracking features can vary by subscription level, so it's worth confirming your plan includes this functionality.

faq.question: How does inventory tracking help prevent overstocking?
faq.answer: By monitoring stock levels and reorder points, businesses can avoid ordering more inventory than needed, reducing storage costs and waste.

faq.question: Can inventory data integrate with e-commerce platforms?
faq.answer: Depending on your setup, QuickBooks Online can integrate with various e-commerce platforms to help synchronize inventory data automatically.
